integrity.description: The final results are shown in a genuine Nuxeo collection view.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target collection name: 'Legal Hold - Acme'. Target documents that MUST be included: 'Acme Service Agreement' and 'Acme NDA Agreement'. Distractor documents that MUST NOT be included: 'Acme Invoice 2023-001' and 'Beta Service Agreement'.
